translation.hero_subtitle: Ṣíwádìí ifiranṣẹ, ṣayẹwo awọn ọna asopọ, ati itupalẹ ni akoko gidi. Daabobo ibaraẹnisọrọ rẹ.
translation.bento_sandbox_desc: Ya awọn ọna asopọ ti o lewu sọtọ.
translation.stats_trained: SMS Ti A Kọ Lati Ọdọ
translation.stats_languages: Awọn Ede Ti A Ṣe Atilẹyin
translation.features_subtitle: Awọn àlẹmọ spam ti o wọpọ kuna awọn ara Naijiria. Fraudlock kọ lati awọn apẹẹrẹ SMS Naijiria, sọ awọn ede wa, o si pin ọgbọn pẹlu awọn ile-iṣẹ telekomunikẹshọn.
translation.feature_0_desc: Awoṣe Random Forest ti a kọ lori awọn apẹẹrẹ SMS Naijiria 4K+ — jibiti BVN, itaniji Ponzi, jibiti JAMB.
translation.feature_1_desc: Ṣe awari jibiti ni awọn ede Naijiria mẹrin. Awọn asọtẹlẹ yipada ede — AI wa tẹle.
translation.feature_2_desc: AI ka awọn abajade soke ni ọrọ-ọrọ Naijiria. O dara fun awọn olumulo kika kekere.
translation.feature_3_desc: Jabo awọn nọmba jibiti. Ni awọn ìjábọ̀ 20, awọn nọmba ti firanṣẹ si MTN, Glo, & Airtel.
translation.feature_4_desc: Lẹ SMS eyikeyi — gba % igbẹkẹle, ipele ewu, ati awọn ọrọ ifura ni < 200ms.
translation.feature_5_desc: Asọtẹlẹ kọọkan fihan awọn ẹya TF-IDF, awọn igbelaruge ọrọ-ọrọ, ati iṣeeṣe — AI ti o ṣe alaye patapata.
translation.fraud_ticker_label: Awọn Jibiti Ti A Ṣe Awari
translation.how_0_desc: Ede eyikeyi — eto wa ṣe iwari awọn ede-ede Naijiria ati awọn iyatọ Pidgin ti agbegbe.
translation.how_1_desc: Awọn ẹya n-gram 50K ti a fa jade, ti a wọn fun iwe-itumọ jibiti Naijiria.
translation.how_2_desc: Apejọ ti a kọ pẹlu predict_proba() — ko si apoti dudu.
translation.how_3_desc: Ipele ti o jẹ ti Naijiria: BVN, JAMB, GTB, OTP, awọn ilana 'ilọpo owo'.
translation.how_4_desc: % igbẹkẹle, ipele ewu, awọn ọrọ ifura — AI wa ka wọn soke.
translation.lang_subtitle: Yipada ede — gbogbo ikilọ ati iwọn igbẹkẹle yoo yipada. Awọn asọtẹlẹ yipada ede; AI wa ko padanu.
translation.lang_0_sample: You have won ₦5,000,000! Send your BVN and ATM PIN to claim your prize now.
translation.lang_1_sample: Oga, your account don block! Send your BVN quick quick make we fix am for you.
translation.lang_2_sample: E ku ile o! Owo ₦2,000,000 ti de fun yin. Fi BVN yin ranse lati gba.
translation.lang_3_sample: Nwanne, ego ₦3,000,000 dị n'akpa gị. Zitere anyị BVN gị ugbu a.
translation.lang_4_sample: Ka samu ₦1,000,000! Aika BVN dinka yanzu don karbar kudin.
translation.community_body_1: Nọmba jibiti kọọkan ti o jabo ni a tọju, ka, ati itupalẹ. Nígbà tí nọmba bá dé <1>àwọn ìjábọ̀ agbegbe 20</1>, yóò wọ àkójọ telco wa — yóò sì firanṣẹ fún MTN, Glo, àti Airtel.
translation.community_body_2: Ìjábọ̀ rẹ kò ní sọnù. O le tọpasẹ rẹ ninu dashboard alákóso, wo iye awọn miiran ti o jabo nọmba kanna.
translation.pricing_0_sub: Ọfẹ titi ayeraye fun awọn ara Naijiria
translation.pricing_1_f4: Dashboard itupalẹ to ti ni ilọsiwaju
translation.cta_subtitle: Darapọ mọ nẹtiwọọki olugbeja jibiti AI ti Naijiria. Ọfẹ fun awọn ara ilu. Wiwọle API fun awọn telco ati banki.
translation.footer_tagline: Olugbeja Jibiti SMS AI · Ṣe Fun Naijiria · fraudlock.ng
translation.detect_subtitle: Lẹ SMS eyikeyi lati ṣayẹwo boya o jẹ igbiyanju jibiti. Ti a ṣe pẹlu TF-IDF + Random Forest + SVM.
translation.report_subtitle: Jabo awọn nọmba ti o fi awọn ifiranṣẹ jibiti ranṣẹ si ọ. Awọn nọmba ti o ni awọn ìjábọ̀ 20+ yoo firanṣẹ si awọn telco.
translation.report_message_placeholder: Lẹ ifiranṣẹ jibiti ti o gba…
translation.report_progress: {{count}} / {{threshold}} àwọn ìjábọ̀ tó nílò fún asia-aifọwọyi
translation.result_feedback_thanks: A ti gba esi rẹ. E dupe!
translation.detect_mic_unsupported: Ohun ko ṣiṣẹ nibi. Lo Chrome.
translation.numbers_subtitle: Wa nọmba Naijiria eyikeyi lati wo itan jibiti rẹ.
translation.numbers_not_found: Ko si ìjábọ̀ fun nọmba yii.
translation.numbers_clean: Nọmba yii dabi ẹnipe o jẹ ailewu.
translation.numbers_directory_subtitle: Gbogbo awọn nọmba ti a samisi
translation.numbers_empty_directory: Ko si nọmba ti a samisi.
